seoTitle: Glenfield Park vs Glengarrie — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Glenfield Park and Glengarrie. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Glenfield Park vs Glengarrie: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Glenfield Park and Glengarrie.
heading: Glenfield Park vs Glengarrie — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Glenfield Park, New South Wales and Glengarrie, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Glenfield Park has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Glengarrie (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Glenfield Park or Glengarrie safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Glenfield Park has a flood risk score of 36/100, while Glengarrie scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Glenfield Park scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Glengarrie scores 62/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Glenfield Park or Glengarrie?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Glenfield Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
